overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dark forest path at night. The character passes ancient stone ruins and continues through dense woodland with atmospheric moonlight filtering through the trees.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with swords on his back, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with grass edges
low stone wall running parallel to the path on the right side
tall coniferous trees forming dense forest on the left
tall coniferous trees forming dense forest on the right

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt forest path at night, flanked by dense pine trees. A low stone wall runs along the right side of the path as the character moves steadily forward through the moonlit woodland.

events.description: approaching and passing a tall stone pillar ruin on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking past the stone ruins, maintaining a steady pace along the trail

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone pillar ruin with moss, part of ancient wall structure

segments.scene_description: As Geralt progresses, a prominent stone pillar ruin comes into view on the right, part of the ancient wall structure. The character walks past this landmark while the stone wall continues alongside the path before eventually ending.

events.description: exiting the stone wall area into denser forest with more visible sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking deeper into the forest, leaving the ruins behind

entered.detail: mountain range visible in the far distance through the trees

segments.scene_description: Beyond the ruins, the path continues through denser forest with the stone structures now behind. The sky becomes more visible overhead revealing distant mountains, while Geralt maintains his steady walk along the winding trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit forest path that transitions from a structured ruin to an open, wild woodland. It begins with Geralt walking steadily along a narrow dirt trail flanked by dense pine trees and a low stone wall. As he progresses, the camera tracks past a prominent stone pillar ruin that marks the end of the ancient wall structure. The scene then shifts as the ruins recede behind him, leading the character deeper into a denser stretch of forest. Finally, the canopy opens up to reveal distant mountains against the night sky as the winding trail continues forward.
